profile.name: Jirathiwat Suntipreedatham
profile.headline: Software engineer and part-time IT CITY sales consultant building real-time AI systems, cinematic recommendation engines, and production-ready web applications.
profile.bio: Hi to see you there! I am Jirathiwat Suntipreedatham, a software engineer, Faculty of Information and Communication Technology, Mahidol University student, and part-time Sales Consultant at IT CITY Public Company Limited in Bangkok. My background includes international computer competition experience, international seminar experience, leadership in an International Relations Program, project work, sales work, and marketing department experience.

expertise.description: Designing and deploying machine learning models, computer vision pipelines, and intelligent recommendation systems.
Building robust, scalable, and deterministic software architectures with a focus on system-level performance.
Creating high-performance APIs, managing hybrid databases, and handling server-side logic and deployments.
Crafting responsive, dynamic, and beautiful user interfaces with modern web technologies.
Leveraging advanced language models to accelerate development, analyze data, and build intelligent workflows.
Designing physical objects and environments for product design and interactive experiences.
Creating and editing professional-grade media for content creation and marketing.

experiences.description: Part-time, on-site Sales Consultant in Bangkok, Bangkok City, Thailand, with experience in customer satisfaction, technology retail, and sales communication.

experiences.company: Faculty of Information and Communication Technology, Mahidol University
experiences.description: Studying ICT while developing skills across C, Python, software engineering, web development, AI, data science, and operating systems.

experiences.role: Software Engineer, AI & Data Science Project Developer
experiences.company: Faculty of Information and Communication Technology, Mahidol University
experiences.description: Developed advanced academic projects across real-time computer vision, operating-system-aware AI optimization, hybrid recommendation engines, and full-stack e-commerce systems.

education.program: Faculty of Information and Communication Technology (ICT)
education.description: Current undergraduate ICT student developing technical foundations in software engineering, AI, data science, programming, and systems.
Completed a science-mathematics secondary school track with programming foundations.

projects.name: Iron Dome Missile Tracker v3.1
projects.description: A high-performance real-time tactical computer vision application that optimizes resource-heavy AI inference pipelines inside bounded, time-critical software environments. The system demonstrates how custom OS resource management can accelerate machine learning workloads while handling HD video processing, deep learning inference, and telemetry write-backs without dropping frames.
projects.associated: Faculty of Information and Communication Technology, Mahidol University
highlights: Perfect ITCS225 grading rubric score of 16/16
Custom system-level architecture for memory, scheduling, and synchronization
Deterministic execution with ultra-low latency and frame-rate stability
Simultaneous HD video processing, inference, and telemetry write-backs

projects.name: CineMatch 2.0: The Cinematic Oracle
projects.description: A production-grade movie discovery platform for ITCS227 that uses GPU-accelerated semantic search, high-dimensional embeddings, and hybrid recommendation logic to understand the soul and vibe of more than 436,000 movies.
projects.associated: Faculty of Information and Communication Technology, Mahidol University
highlights: Metadata Soup fingerprint using title, overview, genre, keywords, and era tags
50/50 hybrid score combining semantic similarity and IMDB weighted quality
Mood Fusion intent parser for visual style, emotion, and narrative complexity
Hidden Gem Radar and interactive Plotly 3D discovery explorer

projects.name: BoonSonClon Premium Furniture Store
projects.description: A high-performance full-stack e-commerce platform designed for premium furniture retail, featuring a hybrid database system, production deployment, and a responsive mobile-first shopping experience.
